members.name: Function
members.summary: A function to be applied to the texture coordinates.

values.name: FUNC_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Function] enum.

values.name: FUNC_PANNING
values.summary: Translates [code]uv[/code] by using [code]scale[/code] and [code]offset[/code] values using the following formula: [code]uv = uv + offset * scale[/code]. [code]uv[/code] port is connected to [code]UV[/code] built-in by default.

values.name: FUNC_SCALING
values.summary: Scales [code]uv[/code] by using [code]scale[/code] and [code]pivot[/code] values using the following formula: [code]uv = (uv - pivot) * scale + pivot[/code]. [code]uv[/code] port is connected to [code]UV[/code] built-in by default.

constants.name: FUNC_PANNING
constants.summary: Translates [code]uv[/code] by using [code]scale[/code] and [code]offset[/code] values using the following formula: [code]uv = uv + offset * scale[/code]. [code]uv[/code] port is connected to [code]UV[/code] built-in by default.

constants.name: FUNC_SCALING
constants.summary: Scales [code]uv[/code] by using [code]scale[/code] and [code]pivot[/code] values using the following formula: [code]uv = (uv - pivot) * scale + pivot[/code]. [code]uv[/code] port is connected to [code]UV[/code] built-in by default.

constants.name: FUNC_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Function] enum.
